km.Herefordshire, England: ហេរេប៉ូរdស៊ីរe, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: 當Foulke Walwyn於大約1460年出生在英國賀福爾時，他的父親Thomas Walwyn32歲，母親Agnes Milbourne26歲。他至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Foulke Walwyn于大约1460年出生在英国賀福爾时，他的父亲Thomas Walwyn32岁，母亲Agnes Milbourne26岁。他至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Walwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Wal(d)wine, which is of ancient Germanic origin, from elements meaning ‘power’ + ‘friend’.

from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Walweyn, Walwain. The central French form of this name is Gawain (see Gavin ). This name is found in the medieval Arthurian romances and is traditionally explained as an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps meaning ‘hawk of the plain’.

variants.name: Gavin
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gábháin or Ó Gáibhín, both of which are derived from diminutives of gábhadh ‘want’ or ‘danger’ (the second being the more likely meaning here).

Scottish and northern English: from the personal name Gavin, Scottish form of English Gawain and French Gauvain . The name was introduced into English from French versions of the Arthurian romances, where this name was borne by one of the knights of the Round Table, brother of Galahad and Mordred and a nephew of Arthur. It has been taken to be an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps ‘hawk of the plain’.
Scottish: shortened form of McGavin , which is believed to be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gobhann ‘son of the smith’.

nameMeanings.name: Foulke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Folki, based on folk ‘people, tribe’ (for example in Folkvarðr ‘people’ + ‘guard’, which has given rise to the modern forms Folkvar and Falkor ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Foulke Walwyn was born about 1460, in Herefordshire, England, his father, Thomas Walwyn, was 32 and his mother, Agnes Milbourne, was 26. He had at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Foulke Walwyn est né environ 1460, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Walwyn, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes Milbourne, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Foulke Walwyn um 1460 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Walwyn 32 und seine Mutter Agnes Milbourne 26. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Foulke Walwyn è nato il circa 1460 nel Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Walwyn, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Milbourne, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Foulke Walwynが約1460年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Walwynは32歳，母Agnes Milbourneは26歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Foulke Walwyn(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Walwyn(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Milbourne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Foulke Walwyn nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Walwyn, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Milbourne, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Foulke Walwyn родился около 1460 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Walwyn было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Milbourne, 26. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Foulke Walwyn nació aproximadamente 1460, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Walwyn, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Agnes Milbourne, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija.
